name: gorgias-pp-mcp
description: Gorgias API surface as MCP tools.

gorgias_api_key.title: GORGIAS_API_KEY
gorgias_api_key.description: Sets GORGIAS_API_KEY for the Gorgias MCP server. Get a credential from https://docs.gorgias.com/en-US/rest-api-208286.

gorgias_username.title: GORGIAS_USERNAME
gorgias_username.description: Sets GORGIAS_USERNAME for the Gorgias MCP server. Get a credential from https://docs.gorgias.com/en-US/rest-api-208286.
